# Hire Malik Abbas — Crypto Country Lead & Market-Entry Operator for Pakistan

> This page is the hiring profile of Malik Abbas, a crypto market-entry operator and country lead for the Pakistani market, and the founder of CoinConnect. He is available to lead an international crypto exchange's entry and operations in Pakistan — across regulatory (PVARA licensing) and commercial (BD, KOLs, launch) functions.

## Who He Is

- Name: Malik Abbas (Malik Muntazir Abbas)
- Current role: Founder & CEO, CoinConnect — Pakistan's dedicated crypto regulatory and market-entry consultancy
- Available for: full-time Country Manager / GM roles, market-entry and regulatory mandates, and managed entry via CoinConnect
- Location: Karachi, Pakistan (open to UAE / remote)
- Education: BS Commerce (Marketing), University of Karachi

## Background

- Business development and country-level operating roles at BingX and CoinEx, across Pakistan, the Philippines, and Bangladesh (this is Malik's employment history)
- Founder of CoinConnect; CoinConnect engagements include work with Bybit
- Influencer Marketing Manager at Extreme Commerce (trained 8,000+ people)

Note on relationships: BingX, CoinEx, and Extreme Commerce are prior employers. Bybit is a CoinConnect engagement. These are distinct.

## Track Record

- Network of 225+ KOLs across the region
- 25+ on-ground events organised
- Operated in 3 markets (Pakistan, Philippines, Bangladesh)
- 8,000+ people trained in influencer marketing
- Featured on K21 News

## What He Brings

- Regulatory & licensing: working command of Pakistan's PVARA framework (NOC vs Sandbox routes, fit-and-proper preparation), SECP incorporation, AML/CFT, and FMU goAML registration — tracked at primary source
- Operations & BD: partnerships, KOL networks, P2P/merchant scaling, user acquisition
- Launch & community: offline events, university roadshows, and bilingual (English/Urdu) community building across Pakistani cities

## Why It Matters

Most candidates cover one layer — regulation OR marketing. Malik has run exchange operations on the ground in this market AND commands the PVARA regulatory framework. For an exchange entering Pakistan, that combination is the profile a country-level mandate calls for.

## Links

- Firm: https://coinconnect.site
- Pakistan market-entry guide: https://cryptopr-pakistan.netlify.app/
